# komodo_swarms (Data Source)

Lists all Komodo Docker Swarms visible to the authenticated user. Use `komodo_swarm` for full details including maintenance windows.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_swarms" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `swarms` (Attributes List) The list of swarms. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--swarms))

<a id="nestedatt--swarms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `swarms`

Read-Only:

- `alerts_enabled` (Boolean) Whether alerts are sent when the swarm is unhealthy.
- `id` (String) The swarm identifier (ObjectId).
- `links` (List of String) Quick links displayed in the Komodo UI for this swarm.
- `name` (String) The name of the swarm.
- `server_ids` (List of String) IDs of the servers that are manager nodes of this swarm.
- `tags` (List of String) Tag IDs attached to this swarm.
